title: CC narrative review S03 panel a3

payload.notes: S03 delivers its half of beat B03 well: lecture-hall return reads instantly; baked thought bubble matches script verbatim ("专心上课……专心。"); phone card bakes both expected literals (ARIS RUNNING, T-19:42) razor-sharp plus the DDL chip and no action needed status line. composition_story=3.5: the phone card and the home-desk inset still compete for the first read, and the warm-classroom vs dark-tech-screen split is softer than ART_BIBLE asks, so the DDL tension only lands on the second pass.
